case_title: WILLIS THOMAS HENRY VS AISH WISFE MR (ARTS EXXON)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY WILLIS THOMAS HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT AISH WISFE MR (ARTS EXXON) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AISH WISFE MR (ARTS EXXON)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIS THOMAS HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AISH WISFE MR (ARTS EXXON) $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $689.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM EMMA V. SANCHEZ FILED.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AISH WISFE MR (ARTS EXXON)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT AISH WISFE MR (ARTS EXXON)
